description: Marketing landing page — copy, design, build, SEO, deploy

typical_tasks.description: Research and write page copy — hero headline, subheadline, value props, social proof, FAQ, CTA. Output: structured copy doc.
Design system spec — color palette, typography, spacing, component styles. Output: design-tokens.json + style guide.
Build landing page — hero, features, social proof, pricing, CTA, footer. Use Next.js + Tailwind. Wire copy from T1, styles from T2.
SEO optimization — meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, structured data (JSON-LD). Add to the page built in T3.
Configure deploy — Vercel project, custom domain DNS records, environment variables, verify live at production URL.

stack_defaults.forms: React Hook Form or simple fetch POST
